## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly knowledge share and open office hours for AirOps and GrowthX Labs collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New team members (Jess, Mariana, Bruno) are still learning AirOps capabilities and integration with existing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [AirOps Academy videos recommended as a comprehensive resource for understanding the platform](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Team members encouraged to bring specific workflow questions to future meetings for troubleshooting](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [AirOps is increasing processing capacity to address recent performance issues](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

## Topics

### AirOps Onboarding and Learning Curve

  - [Team members expressed challenges in understanding AirOps functionality and integration with existing tools (e.g., Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Justina recommended watching AirOps Academy videos (\~2.5 hours) for foundational understanding](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Current onboarding docs lack clear links to Academy resources](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Team to add Academy link to Notion marketing document for future reference](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### Workflow Management and Customization

  - [Questions raised about creating personal workflows vs. team-level workflows](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Workspaces in AirOps are at the organization level, with shared visibility](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a new private workspace for testing and personal use](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### AirOps Support and Communication Channels

  - [Two Slack channels available: "growth x labs air ops" and "growth x labs air ops support"](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Monthly product updates with demo videos for new features to be sent out soon](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Justina hosts regular office hours for troubleshooting and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)

### Team Introductions and Locations

  - [Bruno: Transitioning to Brazil from Austin, TX; background in sales and videography](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Jess: From Nashville, currently in Ohio](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Mariana: Located in Florianópolis, South Brazil](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Justina: Product Manager at AirOps, based in New York City office](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### AI Video Technology

  - [Mariana mentioned an AI video solution used by a client for creating avatar-based videos with customizable scripts and languages](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team members to watch AirOps Academy videos for comprehensive platform understanding](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Add AirOps Academy link to Notion marketing document (Jess to coordinate with Kyle or Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Justina to send out monthly product update with new feature demos](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Bruno to be added to relevant Slack channels for AirOps communication](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Team encouraged to bring specific workflow questions to the next meeting after the break](https://fathom.video/share/EhXjPxi2y_frGEobbcgdqGx1duu7h1ux?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
